name: run-script
description: Create a temp file from inline code or piped stdin and execute it with env config loading, inline env vars, venv auto-detection, timeout, output limiting, and quiet mode, replacing cat-heredoc, -c, and timeout patterns.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Inline code to run (or pipe via stdin)

parameters.name: --config
parameters.description: Path to env config file with KEY=VALUE lines to load before execution

parameters.name: --env
parameters.description: Set an env var as KEY=VALUE (repeatable, replaces inline VAR=val prefix)

parameters.name: --timeout
parameters.description: Run with timeout in seconds (replaces timeout N wrapper)

parameters.name: --head
parameters.description: Show only first N lines of output

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Show only last N lines of output

parameters.name: --quiet
parameters.description: Suppress stderr output (useful for verbose Python debug logs from app initialization)

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses heredoc file creation + config sourcing + env var setting + timeout + execution into one step, saving dozens of script lines and env var declarations as output tokens; --quiet suppresses verbose debug output saving observation tokens.
